---
title: "In-Class Exercise 4"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "May 9, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

[Exercise 4a](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/InClassEx4showmethestatistics/Dashboard1)

[![](image/Picture1.png){width="430"}](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/InClassEx4showmethestatistics/Dashboard1)

[Exercise 4b](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/InClassEx4divergingstackbarchart/Dashboard1?publish=yes)

[![](image/Picture2.png){width="430"}](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/InClassEx4divergingstackbarchart/Dashboard1?publish=yes)
